title.fr: Déclencheurs de lieu de travail - Travaillez partout

description.en:
Turn any location on any map into a legitimate workplace.
Place a trigger anywhere, name it, set a wage, and earn income while you are on the clock. Perfect for roleplayers who want their farmers to have side jobs, or anyone who wants to supplement farm income with off-farm work.
FEATURES: - Placeable trigger zones - invisible zones you drop anywhere on any map - Custom workplace names - call it Post Office, Feed Mill, or anything you want - Hourly wage system - earn income based on real in-game time - Shift tracking HUD - see your active workplace, earnings, and shift time - Persistent saves - all triggers, names, and wages survive game reloads - Singleplayer and multiplayer (host-authoritative)
HOW TO USE: 1. Buy the Work Trigger from the store (under Objects) 2. Place it at any location you want to designate as a workplace 3. Walk into the trigger zone - press [E] to start your shift 4. Press [E] again to end your shift and collect your wages
Type wtHelp in the developer console for debug commands.
description.de:
Verwandle jeden Ort auf jeder Karte in einen legitimen Arbeitsplatz.
Platziere einen Trigger, benenne ihn, lege einen Lohn fest und verdiene Einnahmen, waehrend du auf der Uhr bist.
FUNKTIONEN: - Platzierbare Trigger-Zonen - Benutzerdefinierte Arbeitsplatznamen - Stuendliches Lohnsystem - Schicht-HUD - Persistente Speicherung
description.fr:
Transformez n'importe quel endroit en lieu de travail.
Placez un declencheur, nommez-le, definissez un salaire et gagnez des revenus pendant que vous etes au travail.
description.it:
Trasforma qualsiasi luogo in un posto di lavoro legittimo.
Posiziona un trigger, assegnagli un nome, imposta uno stipendio e guadagna durante il turno.
description.nl:
Maak van elke locatie een legitieme werkplek.
Plaats een trigger, geef het een naam, stel een loon in en verdien inkomen terwijl je aan het werk bent.
description.pl:
Zamien dowolna lokalizacje w legalne miejsce pracy.
Umiec wyzwalacz, nadaj mu nazwe, ustaw stawke i zarabiaj podczas dyspozycji.
